birds.evidence: right|thumb|Male in breeding plumage feeding on scraps of food in Kenya|alt=A small mainly chestnut coloured sparrow with a broad beak feeding on scraps of food placed on a stone slab The chestnut sparrow is found in East Africa in mostly lower country from Darfur through Kordofan, South Sudan, Somalia, Uganda, and Kenya to north-central Tanzania
